name: Research module upgrade
description: Track the upgrade of a DynNav research contribution to benchmark-ready or paper-ready quality.
title: "[Module]: "
labels: ["research", "benchmark", "documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Module

Contribution ID / name:

## Research question

What precise navigation-under-uncertainty question does this module answer?

## Current status

- [ ] Prototype
- [ ] Reproducible demo
- [ ] Benchmark-ready
- [ ] Paper-ready

## Required implementation work

- [ ] Algorithm/API cleanup
- [ ] Experiment script
- [ ] Baseline comparison
- [ ] Ablation study
- [ ] Result logging
- [ ] Tests or smoke checks
- [ ] Documentation update

## Required metrics

List the metrics that should be reported.

## Baselines

List the baselines that should be compared against.

## Expected output artifacts

- [ ] CSV/JSON result file
- [ ] Markdown summary
- [ ] Figure/table if applicable

## Limitations to document

What should this module explicitly not claim?
